creator: shitman71@hotmail.com
text:
Each time i quit a fullscreen-application the loaded icc-profile from oyranos-monitor gets unloaded or resettet, i need to load it again and again each time i quit a fullscreen application.

This also happens if i enter commands via xandr, it doesnt even change resolution or refresh rate but resets the profile.

I gues this affects everyone.

XFCE-Desktop
